# @pondoknusa/auth

Authentication and authorization for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/auth
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `2.0.0` |
| Source | [`packages/auth`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/auth) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
